testcase.name: loginExcelTest

failure.message: org.apache.poi.openxml4j.exceptions.NotOfficeXmlFileException: No valid entries or contents found, this is not a valid OOXML (Office Open XML) file

testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: org.apache.poi.openxml4j.exceptions.NotOfficeXmlFileException: No valid entries or contents found, this is not a valid OOXML (Office Open XML) file at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1597) Caused by: org.apache.poi.openxml4j.exceptions.NotOfficeXmlFileException: No valid entries or contents found, this is not a valid OOXML (Office Open XML) file at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.util.ZipArchiveThresholdInputStream.getNextEntry(ZipArchiveThresholdInputStream.java:161) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.util.ZipInputStreamZipEntrySource.<init>(ZipInputStreamZipEntrySource.java:101) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.ZipPackage.openZipEntrySourceStream(ZipPackage.java:312) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.ZipPackage.<init>(ZipPackage.java:285) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:394) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:364) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:223) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:339) at com.utility.ExcelReaderUtility.readExcelDataFile(ExcelReaderUtility.java:23) at com.ui.dataproviders.LoginDataProvider.loginExcelDataProvider(LoginDataProvider.java:44) ... 25 more Caused by: java.util.zip.ZipException: Cannot find zip signature within the file at org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.ZipArchiveInputStream.readFirstLocalFileHeader(ZipArchiveInputStream.java:1072) at org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.ZipArchiveInputStream.getNextZipEntry(ZipArchiveInputStream.java:681) at org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.ZipArchiveInputStream.getNextEntry(ZipArchiveInputStream.java:651) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.util.ZipArchiveThresholdInputStream.getNextEntry(ZipArchiveThresholdInputStream.java:150) ... 39 more ... Removed 30 stack frames
